title: Broadcom Alert
description: An Alert represents a configurable monitoring rule in Operations for Applications that evaluates metric conditions and triggers notifications when thresholds are breached.

id.description: The unique identifier of the alert.

name.description: The display name of the alert.

condition.description: The query expression that defines the alert condition.

displayExpression.description: The query expression used for display purposes in notifications.

minutes.description: The number of minutes the condition must be met before the alert fires.

resolveAfterMinutes.description: The number of minutes after which the alert auto-resolves if the condition clears.

severity.description: The severity level of the alert.

status.description: The current statuses of the alert.

targets.description: Notification targets keyed by severity level.

creatorId.description: The identifier of the user who created the alert.

updaterId.description: The identifier of the user who last updated the alert.

createdEpochMillis.description: The creation timestamp in epoch milliseconds.

updatedEpochMillis.description: The last update timestamp in epoch milliseconds.
